zh.Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fra: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾
zh.Novy-Chevrières, Ardennes, Champagne-Ard: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯諾維-福利艾雷斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Rethel於1060年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾時，她的父親Hugh I Count of Rethel20歲，母親Melisende of Crécy28歲。她和Eudes de Vitré至少有1個兒子。她去世於1151年4月在她的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Rethel于1060年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾时，她的父亲Hugh I Count of Rethel20岁，母亲Melisende of Crécy28岁。她和Eudes de Vitré至少有1个儿子。她去世于1151年4月在她的家乡享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rethel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: probably a nickname for a fleet footed, slender person, from a diminutive of Middle High German rēch ‘deer’ with the diminutive form being more frequent in earlier time.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Rethel was born in 1060, in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Hugh I Count of Rethel, was 20 and her mother, Melisende of Crécy, was 28. She had at least 1 son with Eudes de Vitré. She died in April 1151, in her hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Rethel est née en 1060, à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Hugh I Count of Rethel, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Melisende of Crécy, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Eudes de Vitré. Elle est décédée en avril 1151, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Rethel 1060 in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh I Count of Rethel 20 und ihre Mutter Melisende of Crécy 28. Sie hatte mit Eudes de Vitré mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb im April 1151 im Alter von 91 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Rethel è nata il nel 1060 nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Hugh I Count of Rethel, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Melisende of Crécy, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Eudes de Vitré. Morì nel aprile 1151, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Rethelが1060年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルで生まれた時，父Hugh I Count of Rethelは20歳，母Melisende of Crécyは28歳であった。彼女はEudes de Vitréとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1151年4月に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Rethel(이)가 1060년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh I Count of Rethel(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende of Crécy(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Eudes de Vitré(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1151년 4월 그녀의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Rethel nasceu em 1060, em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Hugh I Count of Rethel, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Melisende of Crécy, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Eudes de Vitré. Ela faleceu em abril de 1151, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Rethel родилась в 1060 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh I Count of Rethel было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Melisende of Crécy, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Eudes de Vitré. Она умерла апрель 1151 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Rethel nació en 1060, en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Hugh I Count of Rethel, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Melisende of Crécy, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Eudes de Vitré. Murió en abril de 1151, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años.
